items.quote: he has got really good grappling

items.claim: Baljo possesses a significant size advantage over Ko.
items.quote: Baljo was noticeably bigger than him

items.claim: Christian Rodriguez consistently defeats prospects while losing to middle-of-the-road fighters.
items.quote: a guy who loses to people that he should be beaten that are kind of middle of the road guys and then beats really great prospects

items.claim: Jose Miguel Delgado holds a significant size advantage over Austin Bashi.
items.quote: he's going to have a massive size advantage

items.claim: Jose Miguel Delgado is dangerous in early rounds with knees and uppercuts.
items.quote: he is wiry and dangerous in those early rounds with knees up the middle and uppercuts and shots in the pocket

items.claim: Austin Bashi will struggle to secure points against Delgado if he fails to achieve a finish.
items.quote: Bashi will struggle to secure points with his style, you know, if he doesn't get a finish that is.

items.claim: Alberto Montes is highly proficient with the D'Arce choke.
items.quote: He's got a nasty dash choke.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan's hype is more earned than Alberto Montes's hype.
items.quote: I think his hype is more earned
